sections.paragraph:
Hyssop An indigenous plant to Western Asia and Northern Africa
1Ki 4:33
The Israelites used:
- In sprinkling the blood of the paschal lamb upon the lintels of their doors
Exo 12:22
- In sprinkling blood in purifications
Lev 14:4; Lev 14:6; Lev 14:52; Heb 9:19
Used in the sacrifices of separation
Num 19:6
Used in giving Jesus vinegar on the cross
Joh 19:29
Figurative of spiritual cleansing
Psa 51:7
